narrative:
Monroe Township (precinct in Adams County) has 397 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points.
